title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: MAIN OFFICE HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about mortgage resources, down payment assistance programs, foreclosure prevention, and default counseling. 211 SE Byers Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon (541) 276-1926 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 276-1926 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-1926 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Morrow, Umatilla, and Wheeler Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Enter from the front lobby doors on SE Byers Avenue, south side of the building. Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling HUD Approved Counseling Agencies Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Mortgage Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MATERIAL GOODS - HELPING HAND MONEY MANAGEMENT - CAPECO MONEY MANAGEMENT UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MAIN OFFICE
